positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed mandala-style composition featuring bioluminescent cosmic flora and geometric constellations. The centerpiece is a stylized celestial lotus flower, radiating elegant lines and glowing energy points. Surrounding the lotus are intertwining nebulae patterns, delicate crystalline spiderwebs, and geometric stardust trails. Use a deep indigo, ultramarine blue, and vibrant cyan color palette, contrasted sharply with bright, glowing white and ethereal lavender accents. The style must be a perfect blend of Art Nouveau elegance and futuristic deep-space digital art, rendered as a clean, high-contrast, continuous line illustration suitable for screen printing on fabric. Flat, pop art silhouette style, ultra-detailed, centered composition, vector graphic aesthetic, perfect symmetry.
